title: Class is in Session | #shorts
full_text: What is a shad shadi? Shadi shadi. Yeah. Shadi is a Indian wedding. It is a big party. Basically big party for the parents. Okay. You call all the people you know and you show them how rich you are. You put all the jewelries you ever bought all at one time. What if you don't have a lot of money? Yeah. I'm not going to that shadi. What about the bride and the groom? What about them? Does the party happen after or before the wedding? Actually, no one knows. It depends on the priest timing because the priest usually doing 10 in a day. Someone told me once that calling chai tea chai tea is like saying ATM machine. But we all say ATM machine, right? But we all say ATM machine and no one died. Okay. What is puja? Puja is puja. Puja puja is prayer. But then it was also name of Indian girls or troublemakers. Every puja I ever knew was a troublemakers. In what way? Like they all wanted to be artists. They were singing. They were dancing. Okay. And you know that's bad news. Yeah. Yeah. Yeah. You can't do that. Exactly. So I would puja for the pujas. I would pray for the There's no hope
